courses.title: Web Development Practice
courses.description: This course aims to introduce the fundamental theories and practical techniques of modern web development, covering frontend technology stacks (like React/Vue), backend service frameworks, and database integration, emphasizing full-stack capacity through practical projects.

modules.title: Web Basics & Frontend Frameworks
modules.desc: Learn HTML semantics, advanced CSS3 layout, dive deep into the React ecosystem, and master component-based architecture.

modules.title: Backend Architecture Design
modules.desc: Explore RESTful API design and GraphQL architecture, and learn how to build high-concurrency backend services using Node.js or Python FastAPI.

modules.title: Database Integration & DevOps
modules.desc: Deep dive into NoSQL and relational database design, along with an introduction to Docker containerization deployment.

modules.title: Full-Stack Project Practice
modules.desc: Independently build a complete enterprise web application involving frontend-backend interactions, authentication, and data persistence.

modules.title: Performance Optimization & Testing
modules.desc: Master frontend rendering optimization and backend caching strategies, and learn to write high-coverage unit tests and E2E tests.

courses.title: Machine Learning Applications
courses.description: This course focuses on applying machine learning algorithms to practical industrial scenarios, covering data engineering, model training, evaluation, and model deployment to help students master the complete ML lifecycle.

modules.title: Data Preprocessing & Feature Engineering
modules.desc: Master core methodologies for data cleaning, missing value processing, feature extraction, and dimensionality reduction.

modules.title: Supervised Learning Algorithm Applications
modules.desc: In-depth discussion on practical application cases for logistic regression, support vector machines, and various ensemble learning models.

modules.title: Introduction to Deep Learning Practice
modules.desc: Learn to utilize PyTorch to build basic feedforward neural networks and convolutional neural networks, and understand how to fine-tune hyperparameters.

modules.title: Model Evaluation & Diagnostics
modules.desc: Discover how to comprehensively diagnose model bias and variance using metrics like cross-validation, confusion matrices, and ROC curves.

modules.title: Model Deployment & Monitoring
modules.desc: Develop model inference services using Flask/FastAPI and learn to monitor online model performance utilizing MLOps tools.

courses.title: Advanced NLP Technologies
courses.description: Aimed at students with foundational AI knowledge, this course dissects cutting-edge Natural Language Processing technologies, including Transformer architectures, pre-trained large models, and fine-tuning methods for complex language tasks.

modules.title: Language Models & Attention Mechanisms
modules.desc: A review from RNN to the evolution of self-attention mechanisms, offering an in-depth reading of basic principles and computation graphs for the Transformer architecture.

modules.title: Pre-Trained Models Demystified
modules.desc: A comprehensive analysis of BERT and GPT model architectures, discussing their data construction and objective function design during the pre-training phase.

modules.title: Large Model Fine-Tuning Techniques
modules.desc: Learn parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods like LoRA and P-Tuning to adapt massive models to downstream tasks.

modules.title: Text Generation & Information Retrieval
modules.desc: Explore beam search algorithms and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, learning how to mitigate text generation hallucinations.

modules.title: Intensive Reading of NLP Papers
modules.desc: Combines recent leading conference papers (ACL/EMNLP) to analyze the future trajectory of multi-modal interaction and model alignment technologies.

courses.title: Human-Computer Interaction Design
courses.description: Explore the principles bridging human interaction and computing systems. This course teaches the full end-to-end UX design process from user research and prototyping to usability testing and high-fidelity interactions.

modules.title: Human Cognition & Interface Psychology
modules.desc: From the perspectives of human vision, memory, and attention, understand how these cognitive limitations influence interface design guidelines.

modules.title: User Research Methodologies
modules.desc: Learn how to conduct qualitative interviews and surveys, while also building comprehensive user personas and empathy maps.

modules.title: Information Architecture & Interaction Flows
modules.desc: Apply card sorting techniques to untangle complex system hierarchies and establish clear, seamless user journeys and flowcharts.

modules.title: Low-Fi and High-Fi Prototyping
modules.desc: Gain proficiency in tools like Figma, transitioning from wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes featuring complex animations and micro-interactions.

modules.title: Usability Evaluation & Data Tracking
modules.desc: Design and execute A/B tests alongside usability tests, learning to support decision-making with quantitative data during reiterative interface design.
